query: Japan HFMD hand-foot-and-mouth disease national cases per sentinel (定点当たり報告数) Week 27 2026 provisional (速報) IDWR JIHS. Also confirmed Week 25 and Week 26 values, and week-over-week trajectory for weeks 20-27 of the 2026 season.
answer:
I've completed the research on Japan's national HFMD (手足口病) cases-per-sentinel trajectory for the 2026 season.

## Key findings

**Direct answers:**
- **Week 27, 2026 (PROVISIONAL / 速報):** national cases per sentinel = **7.03** (15,845 cases; period 6/29–7/5), published by JIHS/IDWR on **2026-07-14**. This exceeded the warning threshold (5.0) nationally for the first time in two years, with 27 prefectures above 5.0. Subject to revision; next update 2026-07-21.
- **Week 26 (CONFIRMED):** **4.61** (10,396 cases) — from the official IDWR Vol.28 No.26 report (published 2026-07-10).
- **Week 25 (CONFIRMED):** **~3.4** (7,576 cases).

**Weeks 20–27 trajectory (national, cases/sentinel):**
| W20 | W21 | W22 | W23 | W24 | W25 | W26 | W27* |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0.65 | ~1.31 | 1.41 | 1.98 | 2.75 | ~3.4 | 4.61 | 7.03* |

The series has risen **monotonically every week since Week 20** — the IDWR explicitly notes "第20週以降増加が続いている." The steepest jump is W26→W27 (+2.42). The official report characterizes 2026 as tracking "roughly in line with typical years," where HFMD historically peaks around Week 30 near ~10/sentinel. Predominant viruses in 2026: CA6 and EV71.

The most authoritative source was the official JIHS/NIID IDWR PDF (confirmed data through Week 26); Week 27 comes from the same-day (2026-07-14) provisional release. I cross-validated intermediate weeks against Nihon Iji Shimpo and prefectural (Saga H-CRISIS) summaries that quote the national JIHS figures.

sources.title: 手足口病が警報目安超え、2026年第27週の都道府県別報告数 (Week 27 2026 provisional HFMD summary of JIHS release)
sources.snippet: 国立健康危機管理研究機構は2026年7月14日、2026年第27週の感染症速報を公開。手足口病の報告数は全国15,845件、定点当たり7.03。警報目安5.0を上回ったのは27都府県。

sources.title: IDWR 感染症週報 2026年第26週 (Vol.28 No.26, official confirmed report)
sources.snippet: 2026年の報告は、例年と同様に第20週から定点当たり報告数0.65(1,477例)と増加しはじめ、第26週時点で4.61(10,396例)と増加傾向である。手足口病の定点当たり報告数は第20週以降増加が続いている。

sources.title: 全国の感染症 流行マップ 2026年第25週 (national HFMD week 25)
sources.snippet: 第25週(6月15日~21日)、全国の手足口病は定点あたり3.4人まで上がり、島根では20人近くに達している。前週(2.75人)から+23.6%。

sources.title: 手足口病情報~2026年第26週~ 佐賀県 (national context: week 25 total 7,576)
sources.snippet: 全国約2350ヶ所の小児科定点からの報告によると、2026年第25週(6/15~6/21)の患者報告数は7,576名。

sources.title: 手足口病情報~2026年第25週~ 佐賀県 (national week 24 = 6,202 cases, 2.75/sentinel)
sources.snippet: 2026年第24週(6/8~6/14)の患者報告数は6,202名、定点当たり報告数は2.75です。

sources.title: 感染症発生動向調査 2026年第23週 (Nihon Iji Shimpo, national HFMD week 23 = 1.98)
sources.snippet: 手足口病 2026年第23週の定点当たり報告数は1.98と第20週以降増加が続いている。

sources.title: 手足口病3週連続増加―定点1.41 感染症発生動向調査2026年第22週 (Nihon Iji Shimpo)
sources.snippet: 手足口病 2026年第22週の定点当たり報告数は1.41と3週連続増加。

sources.title: 注目すべき感染症｜国立健康危機管理研究機構 感染症情報提供サイト
sources.snippet: IDWR 2026年第26号<注目すべき感染症> 手足口病・ヘルパンギーナ の記事を更新しました。

key_facts: Week 27 (2026) PROVISIONAL national HFMD cases per sentinel = 7.03 (15,845 total cases; 6/29-7/5), published by JIHS/IDWR on 2026-07-14; subject to revision.
Week 27 was the first time in 2 years the national HFMD value exceeded the warning threshold of 5.0; 27 prefectures exceeded 5.0.
Week 26 (2026) CONFIRMED national HFMD = 4.61 per sentinel (10,396 cases; 6/22-6/28), per official IDWR Vol.28 No.26 report published 2026-07-10.
Week 25 (2026) CONFIRMED national HFMD = ~3.4 per sentinel (7,576 cases; 6/15-6/21).
IDWR states HFMD cases per sentinel have increased continuously since week 20 of 2026 ('第20週以降増加が続いている'); the series is monotonically rising W20-W27.
The largest single-week increase was W26->W27 (+2.42/sentinel; 4.61 -> 7.03).
Surveillance uses ~2,000 pediatric sentinel sites (reduced from ~3,000 before 2025-04-07); sentinel count changed at week 15 of 2025, requiring caution in cross-year raw-count comparisons.
2026 is described as roughly in line with typical years; historic HFMD peaks around week 30 near 10.00/sentinel. 2025 was unusually low (max 0.63 at W31); 2024 was bimodal (W28=13.34, W41=10.78).
Week 27 top prefectures (provisional): Shimane 18.00, Saga 11.83, Tokyo 11.72, Chiba 11.59, Toyama 10.69, Nara 10.09.
Predominant HFMD viruses in 2026 (as of 7/1): Coxsackievirus A6 (CA6) and Enterovirus 71 (EV71).
